creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
It did not work for me, I was trying upgrade from both clamav-0.98.3_3 and clamav-0.98.3_4 to clamav-0.98.3_6 using portmaster. It worked, however, doing

portmaster --force-config security/clamav

and disabling compile-time checks. Running the same command second time and re-enabling compile-time checks yields success, so I assume there was some unknown interaction between older clamav installed when running tests with newly compiled test suite.
